welcome.title: Bem vindo ao Duality Codex
welcome.description: Crie, gerencie, e acompanhe seus personagens de Daggerheart RPG com esta ferramenta digital intuitiva.

character_creation.title: Criação de Personagem
character_creation.description: Crie seu personagem com um assistente intuitivo passo a passo que o guiará em cada escolha.

character_management.title: Gerenciador de Personagem
character_management.description: Acompanhe o progresso, o inventário e as habilidades do seu personagem com nossas fichas digitais fáceis de usar.

secure_private.title: Seguro & Privado
secure_private.description: Os dados do seu personagem são armazenados com segurança e acessíveis somente a você.

cta.title: Pronto para começar sua aventura?
cta.description: Junte-se à nossa comunidade de aventureiros e comece a criar seus personagens únicos de Daggerheart hoje mesmo.

dashboard.subtitle: Gerencie seus personagens e embarque em novas aventuras
dashboard.no_characters_description: Crie seu primeiro personagem para começar sua jornada! Você pode ter até {max} personagens e campanhas no total.
dashboard.limit_description: Você atingiu o máximo de {max} personagens e campanhas no total. Apague um personagem ou campanha para criar mais.
dashboard.limit_description_free: Você atingiu o limite gratuito de {max} personagens e campanhas. Torne-se um assinante para desbloquear mais recursos!
dashboard.upgrade_prompt: Quer mais personagens e campanhas? Torne-se um assinante!
dashboard.discord_description: Conecte-se com outros jogadores, compartilhe seus personagens e obtenha ajuda no Discord!

guides.title: Guias
guides.subtitle: Aprenda a usar regras opcionais e preferências de personagem no Gerenciador de Personagens do Duality Codex.

character_creation.title: Criação de Personagem
character_creation.description: Assistente passo a passo para criar seu personagem. Escolha ancestralidade, classe, herança e configure suas habilidades.

domain_cards.title: Cartas de Domínio & Mão
domain_cards.description: Gerencie suas magias e habilidades de domínio com o sistema de Mão e Reserva. Mova cartas livremente entre elas.

campaigns.title: Campanhas
campaigns.description: Crie campanhas para agrupar personagens. Convide jogadores e compartilhe conteúdo dentro do seu grupo.

workshop.title: A Oficina
workshop.description: Crie armas, armaduras e itens personalizados. Publique para a comunidade ou mantenha-as privadas para seus jogos.

sharing.title: Compartilhe Personagens
sharing.description: Compartilhe suas fichas de personagem com outros jogadores. Importe os personagens compartilhados para sua conta.

homebrew.title: Diretrizes para Homebrew
homebrew.description: Diretrizes para criar e publicar conteúdo personalizado na Oficina da comunidade.

cross_domain_cards.title: Avanço de Cartas Interdomínio
cross_domain_cards.description: Aprenda como habilitar o recurso opcional de Cartas Interdomínio para obter cartas de qualquer domínio durante a subida de nível.

scars.title: Cicatrizes
scars.description: Entenda como as cicatrizes de fahas ao Evitar a Morte afetam a Esperança do seu personagem e como gerenciá-las.

currency.title: Configurações de Riquezas
currency.description: Configure como seu personagem rastreia o ouro — punhados ou o sistema opcional de moedas.

massive_damage.title: Dano Massivo
massive_damage.description: Habilite e use a regra opcional de Dano Massivo para causar golpes devastadores.

cross_domain.title: Avanço de Cartas Interdomínio
cross_domain.subtitle: Como habilitar e usar o recurso opcional de avanço de Cartas Interdomínio ao subir de nível seu personagem.

what_is.title: O que é Cartas Interdomínio
what_is.description: O avanço Carta Interdomínio permite que você escolha uma carta de domínio de qualquer domínio fora dos seus domínios de classe ao subir de nível. Essa regra opcional é semelhante à opções no Demiplane — ela expande as habilidades do seu personagem além dos domínios nativos da sua classe.
what_is.level_rule: O nível da carta não pode exceder metade do seu nível de personagem (arredondado para cima). Por exemplo, um personagem de nível 5 pode escolher cartas de domínio cruzado de até nível 3.

how_to_enable.title: Como habilitar
how_to_enable.intro: Você precisa habilitar as Cartas Interdomínio para que a opção apareça durante a subida de nível. Você pode habilitá-la para toda a sua conta (afeta novos personagens e subidas de nível) ou para personagens individuais.

account.title: Para toda a conta (Recomendado)
account.description: Ative as Cartas Interdomínio nas preferências da sua conta. Isso se aplica a todos os seus personagens e disponibiliza o avanço ao subir de nível.

character.title: Por personagem
character.description: Você também pode habilitar as cartas Interdomínio para um personagem específico na tela de edição de personagem.
character.step1: Abra seu personagem e acesse a aba Preferências.

level_up.title: Usando ao subir de nível
level_up.description: Uma vez habilitado, o avanço Carta Interdomínio aparecerá como uma opção no assistente de evolução (Nível 2 e superior). Selecione-o como um de seus avanços e, em seguida, escolha uma carta de domínio de qualquer domínio fora da sua classe. Você pode escolher no máximo uma carta interdomínio por evolução.

scars.title: Cicatrizes
scars.subtitle: Como as cicatrizes afetam a Esperança do seu personagem e como editá-las.

what_are.title: O que são Cicatrizes?
what_are.description: Cicatrizes são marcas permanentes resultantes de falhas em testes ao Evitar a Morte. Cada cicatriz representa uma ferida duradoura que reduz a Esperança máxima do seu personagem.
what_are.effective_hope: Sua Esperança máxima efetiva é igual à sua Esperança máxima menos suas cicatrizes. Por exemplo, com 6 de Esperança máxima e 2 cicatrizes, você tem 4 espaços de Esperança efetivas.

how_to.title: Como editar Cicatrizes?
how_to.description: As cicatrizes são gerenciadas na tela de edição de personagem.
how_to.step1: Abra seu personagem e acesse a aba Preferências.
how_to.step3: Clique em Editar e defina o número de cicatrizes (de 0 até o máximo de Esperança menos 1).

currency.title: Configurações de Riquezas
currency.subtitle: Gerencie ouro e moedas de seu personagem.

default.title: Riqueza Padrão
default.description: Por padrão, os personagens gerenciam o ouro usando Punhados, Bolsas e Baús. Isso segue as regras padrão de Daggerheart.

coins.title: Moedas Opcionais
coins.description: Quando habilitado, As moedas são adicionadas como a menor unidade: 10 moedas equivalem a 1 punhado. A hierarquia da moeda passa a ser Moedas → Punhados → Sacos → Baú.

how_to.title: Como Configurar
how_to.step1: Abra seu personagem e acesse a aba Preferências
how_to.step2: Procure a seção Configurações de Riquezas

massive_damage.title: Dano Massivo (Regra Opcional)
massive_damage.subtitle: Ative a regra opcional para golpes devastadores que causam dano extra.

what_is.title: O que é Dano Massivo?
what_is.description: Dano Massivo é uma regra opcional de Daggerheart para ataques particularmente devastadores.
what_is.rule: Se um personagem sofrer dano igual ao dobro do seu limite de Dano Grave em um único golpe, ele marcará 4 PV em vez de 3. Quando ativado, um quarto botão de limite de dano aparecerá na ficha do personagem para essa situação.

how_to.title: Como habilitar
how_to.step1: Abra seu personagem e acesse a aba Preferências

homebrew_guidelines.meta_title: Diretrizes para Conteúdo Homebrew - Gerenciador de Personagens do Duality Codex
homebrew_guidelines.meta_description: Regras e diretrizes para compartilhar conteúdo Homebrew com a comunidade do Gerenciador de Personagens do Duality Codex.
homebrew_guidelines.title: Diretrizes de Conteúdo Homebrew
homebrew_guidelines.subtitle: Regras e diretrizes para compartilhar conteúdo Homebrew com a comunidade

intro.paragraph1: A seguir, apresentamos as regras e diretrizes para compartilhar conteúdo Homebrew com a comunidade. Você NÃO precisa publicar seu conteúdo Homebrew publicamente para usá-lo ou compartilhá-lo em sua própria campanha. Além disso, tanto as Regras e Diretrizes do Site quanto os Termos de Serviço se aplicam a todo conteúdo Homebrew público. Qualquer conteúdo Homebrew público que viole essas regras e diretrizes terá sua aprovação negada e será removido.
intro.paragraph2: Importante: Depois de publicar uma criação Homebrew, ela não poderá ser removida. Após a publicação, a criação só poderá ser atualizada através da opção "Criar nova versão".

homebrew_guidelines.unacceptable_title: Conteúdo inaceitável para conteúdo Homebrew público

naming_and_shaming.title: Exposição e Difamação
naming_and_shaming.description: Não queremos ver acusações unilaterais ou qualquer outra forma de difamação e exposição pública como parte de qualquer conteúdo Homebrew.

personal_info.title: Informações Pessoais
personal_info.description: Informações pessoais suas ou de qualquer outra pessoa não devem ser publicadas em conteúdo Homebrew.

spamming_trolling.title: Spam e Trolagem
spamming_trolling.description: Spam e provocações não são aceitáveis ​​em nenhuma criação de conteúdo Homebrew. Isso inclui, mas não se limita a:
spamming_trolling.list1: Criar conteúdo com o único propósito de causar desordem.
spamming_trolling.list2: Comunicar excessivamente a mesma frase, frases semelhantes ou puro non-sense.
spamming_trolling.list3: Postar memes ou textos provocativos como parte de conteúdo Homebrew (por exemplo, "que história legal, mano", "tá bravo?", "10/10", imagens com legendas, etc.)

links.title: Links para Outros Sites
links.description: Você não pode criar conteúdo Homebrew e incluir um link para outro site. Por exemplo, você não pode criar uma raça e incluir: "para mais informações, visite meu site/blog/loja".

ban_items.illegal_pdf: Downloads ilegais de PDFs/conteúdo oficial ou dos sites que os criam/utilizam.
ban_items.keyloggers: Keyloggers, hoaxes, e/ou sites de phishing
ban_items.illegal_activities: Atividades consideradas ilegais pelos proprietários do conteúdo.
ban_items.religious: Opiniões/debates religiosos (do mundo real - princípios religiosos fictícios geralmente são aceitáveis, desde que não sejam polêmicos)
ban_items.hateful: Discurso de ódio relacionado a raça, religião, país, crenças políticas, etc.
ban_items.referral_links: Links de publicidade para concursos, promoções ou qualquer outra coisa.

official.paragraph1: NÃO envie material oficial para conteúdo Homebrew público. (Por exemplo, enviar conteúdo oficial de livros de regras publicados NÃO é permitido como parte de conteúdo Homebrew público).
official.paragraph2: Por favor, não envie pequenas variações de conteúdo oficial (como uma arma alterada para um guarda da cidade ou uma versão "guerreiro" de um monstro padrão). É aceitável enviar variações, desde que contenham mudanças adicionais significativas.

ai.paragraph1: Reservamo-nos o direito de remover conteúdo público que contenha imagens e conteúdo gerados por IA. Embora as ferramentas de IA possam ser úteis para inspiração e desenvolvimento, o conteúdo Homebrew compartilhado publicamente deve representar trabalho criativo original. Conteúdo que seja primária ou substancialmente gerado por IA poderá ser removido a nosso critério.
ai.paragraph2: Esta política ajuda a manter a qualidade e a autenticidade do conteúdo compartilhado pela comunidade. Você pode usar ferramentas de IA para conteúdo Homebrew privado em suas próprias campanhas.

public.intro: Se você deseja compartilhar sua criação Homebrew com a comunidade em geral, ela deve seguir as seguintes diretrizes:
public.rule1: Não envie criações Homebrew com nomes que comecem com um espaço, colchete, símbolo ou número.
public.rule2: Não envie conteúdo Homebrew que contenha material protegido por direitos autorais. Podemos analisá-lo novamente se você remover todo e qualquer conteúdo protegido por direitos autorais e quaisquer referências a ele (por exemplo, conteúdo de outros jogos, filmes, livros, etc.).
public.rule3: Não envie nenhum conteúdo que pertença a um parceiro terceiro.
public.rule4: Images may not be included or embedded in public homebrew.
public.rule5: Please ensure that any public homebrew content you submit contains all of the correct modifiers. Missing modifiers may cause issues with values not appearing properly within the character sheet/character builder.
public.rule6: Please do not submit homebrew that is only designed for personal campaigns. This includes descriptive references to specific PCs/NPCs, as well as places and events.
public.rule7: Do not re-submit previously rejected submissions without making an attempt to resolve the reason why it was rejected.
public.rule8: Do not submit new base or mundane items. If you wish to share your creation of mundane items/weapons, we recommend posting these in the community forums.

magic_items.title: Magic Items
magic_items.description: Do not submit magical items that are not actually magical items. This includes items that are meant to replicate/emulate Blessings / Curses / Feats / Class features etc.

ancestries.title: Races/Ancestries
ancestries.description: You may not create subraces for official races that do not normally have subraces. For example, you would not be able to create subraces for races that don't have them (but would be able to create a Variant, as long as it's sufficiently different from the version found in official material).

homebrew_guidelines.reminder: Remember: You can always use homebrew privately for your own games! Publishing is optional and only required if you want to share with the community.

guides_meta.index_description: Learn how to use optional rules and character preferences in the Duality codex Character Manager.

session.fear_description: Track the rising tension and danger throughout your campaign. The GM adjusts this value based on narrative events.

fear_table.title: Fear Table
fear_table.incidental_desc: A catch-up between PCs after an emotionally charged scene; gathering information; resupplying at a local market; resting during downtime.
fear_table.minor_desc: A travel sequence; a minor skirmish that introduces new foes or signals future trouble.
fear_table.standard_desc: A substantial battle with a notable objective; perilous travel that tests might and wit; a tense social encounter seeking crucial information or aid.
fear_table.major_desc: A large battle with a Solo or Leader adversary; a character-defining scene with a significant change to a character's personal story (such as revelation, growth, and betrayal).
fear_table.climactic_desc: A major confrontation with the villain of a story arc; an epic set piece battle; a judicial duel to determine an important NPC's fate.

session.no_members: No members in this campaign yet

session.no_character_description: Leave the campaign without an active character
session.no_players: No players have joined this campaign yet.

info.title: About Countdowns
info.description: Countdowns represent a period of time or series of events preceding a future effect. They start at a specific value and are reduced when they advance. Their effect is triggered when the countdown reaches 0.

background.title: Background
background.subtitle: Develop your character's background by answering the questions below. Your background has no explicit mechanical effect, but it greatly affects the character you'll play and the prep the GM will do.
background.origin_label: Where did your character come from?
background.origin_placeholder: Describe your character's homeland, community, or place of origin. What was their early life like?
background.motivation_placeholder: What are their goals, dreams, or motivations? What brought them to this adventure?
background.relationships_label: Who are the important people in your character's life?
background.relationships_placeholder: Family, friends, mentors, rivals, or enemies. How do these relationships shape your character?
background.secrets_label: What secrets or mysteries surround your character?
background.secrets_placeholder: Hidden past, family secrets, unfinished business, or personal struggles.
background.personality_label: How does your character act and speak?
background.personality_placeholder: Personality traits, mannerisms, speech patterns, or quirks that make them unique.
background.beliefs_label: What does your character believe in?
background.beliefs_placeholder: Values, ideals, religious beliefs, or personal philosophies that guide their actions.
background.story_placeholder: Weave together the answers above into a cohesive background story. This can be as detailed or as ambiguous as you prefer - you can always discover more through play.
background.connections_label: How is your character connected to the world? (Optional)
background.connections_placeholder: Organizations, locations, events, or ongoing situations your character is involved with.
background.notes_placeholder: Any other important details, ideas for future development, or notes for your GM.
background.remember_content: You can adjust choices from earlier steps to better reflect your character's background. If you prefer to keep your character's past more ambiguous, that's perfectly fine - you can discover their backstory through play!

custom_counters.count_direction_description: Choose whether to fill dots from left to right or right to left
custom_counters.name_placeholder: e.g., Inspiration, Rage Points, Ki Points

info.title: Class Selection
info.content: Select the class that defines your character's abilities and role in the party. Each class offers unique specializations and features to customize your playstyle.

info.title: Class Features
info.content: Every class begins with unique features. If your class feature requires a selection, choose now.

subclass_info.title: Subclass Features
subclass_info.content: Your {subclass} specialization grants these unique abilities.{spellcast}

complete.title: Class Selection Complete
complete.content: All required class and subclass features have been selected. You can proceed to the next step.

incomplete.title: Class Selection Incomplete
incomplete.content: Please make all required selections for your class and subclass features before proceeding.

delete_confirmation.title: Remove Armor
delete_confirmation.message: Are you sure you want to remove {armorName}? This action cannot be undone.

armor_modal.title: Select Armor
armor_modal.no_results: No armor found matching your criteria

hope.title: Hope
hope.custom_counters_hint: Tip: You can add custom counters on the Edit page under the Experience tab.

experience.usage: Usage: Spend 1 Hope to add the experience bonus to a relevant action roll

combo_die.title: Combo Die
combo_die.name: COMBO DIE
combo_die.description: Your Combo Die is used for Combo Strikes. Mark a Stress to start a combo strike and roll your Combo Die, continuing to roll until you get a lower result.

weapons.title: Active weapons
weapons.set_active: Set active in the equipment section

beastform.title: BEASTFORM
beastform.attack_description: Use the creature's listed range, trait, and damage dice, but use your Proficiency.
beastform.weapons_disabled: Normal weapons are disabled while in beastform

attributes_step.title: Assign Attribute Modifiers
attributes_step.instructions: Assign the following modifiers to your six attributes in any order you wish: +2, +1, +1, +0, +0, -1

intro.title: Building Relationships
intro.content: Connections are the relationships between player characters. Record your connections with other party members below.

section.title: Your Character Connections
section.description: Add your connections to other player characters. Work with your group to establish these relationships collaboratively.

family.title: Family/Friends
family.description: Siblings, childhood friends, or chosen family

professional.title: Professional
professional.description: Former colleagues, guild members, or rivals

shared.title: Shared Experience
shared.description: Survivors of the same event or quest

introductions.title: Character Introductions
introductions.description: Go around the table and have each player describe their character: name, pronouns, description, experiences, and background answers.

discuss.title: Discuss Potential Connections
discuss.description: Use the connection questions below as inspiration to explore relationships between characters.

suggest.title: Suggest & Accept Connections
suggest.description: Suggest at least one connection between your character and each other PC. Accept or reject suggestions as desired.

questions.title: Connection Questions for Inspiration (Click to expand)

shared_history.title: Shared History
shared_history.question_event: Did you meet during a significant event?
shared_history.question_mentor: Do you share a mentor or teacher?

family.title: Family & Blood
family.question_related: Are you related by blood or marriage?
family.question_save: Did one of you save the other's family?
family.question_history: Do your families have a history together?
family.question_adopted: Are you adopted siblings or chosen family?

professional.title: Professional Bonds
professional.question_guild: Were you in the same guild or organization?
professional.question_military: Did you serve together in military or guard?
professional.question_business: Are you business partners or rivals?
professional.question_patron: Do you share the same patron or employer?

debts.title: Debts & Favors
debts.question_debt: Does one of you owe the other a debt?
debts.question_lives: Did you save each other's lives?
debts.question_oath: Are you bound by an oath or promise?
debts.question_secret: Do you share a secret that binds you?

conflict.title: Conflict & Rivalry
conflict.question_enemies: Were you once enemies or rivals?
conflict.question_compete: Did you compete for the same goal?
conflict.question_overcome: Are you working to overcome past conflicts?

goals.title: Shared Goals
goals.question_seek: Do you seek the same thing?
goals.question_enemy: Are you united by a common enemy?
goals.question_vision: Do you share a vision for the future?
goals.question_search: Are you both searching for someone or something?

reminders.title: Important Reminders
reminders.item_reject: Players can reject suggested connections for any reason
reminders.item_not_all: It's okay if there isn't a connection between every pair of PCs
reminders.item_discover: You can always discover and develop relationships through play
reminders.item_focus: Focus on connections that excite you and enhance the story

description.label: Connection Description
description.placeholder: Describe your connection to this character...

heritage_step.title: Choose Your Heritage
heritage_step.description: Your heritage consists of your ancestry (your physical and magical origins) and your community (the culture and traditions that shaped you).

info.title: About Ancestry
info.description: Your ancestry determines your physical traits, innate magical abilities, and natural talents. Choose the one that best fits your character concept.

rules.title: Mixed Ancestry Rules
rules.description: Take the {first} from one ancestry and the {second} from another ancestry to create your unique mixed heritage.

locked.title: Select Ancestry First
locked.description: You must first choose an ancestry before selecting a community.

info.title: About Community
info.description: Your community represents the culture and traditions that shaped you growing up. This influences your social connections, skills, and worldview.

choice_required.title: Elemental Breath Choice Required
choice_required.description: You must choose an element for your Drakona's breath weapon before proceeding to Community selection.

selected.title: Elemental Breath Selected
selected.description: Your breath weapon element has been chosen.

mixed_ancestry.label: MIX
mixed_ancestry.description: A mixed heritage combining {first} and {second} traits.

info.title: Heritage Review
info.content: Review your ancestry, community, and any transformations before proceeding. You can go back to make changes if needed.

summary.title: Heritage Selection Complete
summary.content: Your heritage selections look good! You can proceed to the next step or go back to make changes.

card_info.title: Master of the Craft
card_info.content: Gain a permanent +2 bonus to two of your Experiences or a permanent +3 bonus to one of your Experiences. Then place this card in your vault permanently.

card_info.title: Vitality
card_info.content: When you choose this card, permanently gain two of the following benefits: One Stress slot, One Hit Point slot, or +2 bonus to your damage thresholds. Then place this card in your vault permanently.

domain_cards_step.title: Domain Cards

acquisition.title: Domain Card Acquisition
acquisition.content: When leveling up, you automatically gain 1 new domain card from your class domains at your new level or below. If you selected the 'Additional Domain Card' advancement, you can choose 1 additional card (2 total). You can also exchange existing cards.

header.status_and_available: Current domain card status and available cards from your class domains: {domains}

domain_cards_step.multiclass_info: 🌟 Multiclass detected! You can choose from both {primary} and {secondary} domains.
domain_cards_step.advancement_bonus_info: 🎉 You selected 'Additional Domain Card' advancement - you can choose {count} cards!

info.title: Domain Card Selection
info.description: Choose {count} cards from your class's domains. You can take one card from each domain or {multiple_text}, whichever you prefer.
info.school_of_knowledge: 📚 School of Knowledge Bonus: Your "Prepared" feature grants you an additional domain card!

usage.title: Using Domain Cards
usage.content: Domain cards represent special abilities and techniques your character knows. Work with your GM to determine when and how to use these abilities during play. You'll gain more domain cards as you level up!

filters.no_matches_description: Try adjusting your search or filter options to see more cards.

merged_selection.title: Select Your Domain Cards
merged_selection.description: Choose from your class domains ({classDomains}) at level {level} or below, plus one card from any other domain at level {maxCrossLevel} or below.

cross_domain_section.title: Cross-Domain Card
cross_domain_section.description: Select one domain card from any domain outside your class domains. The card's level cannot exceed {maxLevel} (half your character level, rounded up).
cross_domain_section.no_cards_description: There are no domain cards available from other domains at your level.

exchange.title: Card Exchange
exchange.move_to_vault_description: Choose a card to replace in your loadout if you want, this card is moved to your vault
exchange.replace_card_description: Choose any card you have and replace it with a card from your domains (same level or lower). The new card goes to the same location.
exchange.not_available_description: Card exchange becomes available once you have domain cards. Complete character creation first to gain your starting domain cards.
exchange.no_cards_to_exchange_description: You don't have any domain cards to exchange yet.

rules.title: Starting Equipment Rules
rules.description: Select from Tier 1 equipment tables. Choose either a two-handed primary weapon OR a one-handed primary + one-handed secondary weapon. Your Proficiency is 1 at Level 1.

selection.title: Choose Your Tier 1 Armor

no_armor.title: No Armor
no_armor.description: Ideal for Bare Bones domain card users or unique builds

selection.no_armor_available: No armor available for character creation.

additional.title: Additional Items (Optional)
additional.placeholder: List any other GM-approved items you'd like to start with...
additional.note: Work with your GM to add any other starting items that fit your character concept.

info.title: What are Experiences?
info.description: Experiences are words or phrases that encapsulate skills, traits, or aptitudes your character possesses. You get {count} at character creation, each providing a {bonus} when relevant.

clank_bonus.error: As a Clank, you must select which experience aligns with your purpose

usage.title: Using Experiences
usage.content: During play, you can spend 1 Hope to add +2 to any action roll where one of your Experiences would be relevant. Work with your GM to determine when an Experience applies!

review_step.title: Review Your Character
review_step.description: Review all your character details before finalizing creation.

basic_items.title: Basic Items
basic_items.content: Torch, 50 feet of rope, basic supplies, handful of gold

usage.title: Using Experiences
usage.content: Spend 1 Hope to add +2 to a relevant action roll

origin.label: WHERE DID YOUR CHARACTER COME FROM?

relationships.label: IMPORTANT PEOPLE IN YOUR CHARACTER'S LIFE

connections.empty_description: Connections will appear here as your character develops relationships during gameplay

cards.description_placeholder: Describe your character's appearance, mannerisms, and notable features...

hidden.name: Hidden
hidden.description: Out of sight from enemies. Rolls against Hidden creatures have disadvantage.

restrained.name: Restrained
restrained.description: Cannot move, but can still take actions from current position.

vulnerable.name: Vulnerable
vulnerable.description: All rolls targeting this creature have advantage.

rollback.confirm_message: Are you sure you want to rollback your last level up? This will undo all choices made during that level up and cannot be easily reversed.

short.title: Short Rest
short.description: Lasts enough time to catch breath, about an hour.

long.title: Long Rest
long.description: When characters make camp and relax or sleep for several in-game hours.
long.choose_two: Choose 2 downtime moves (can choose the same twice):

tend_wounds.name: Tend to Wounds
tend_wounds.effect: Clear 1d4+Tier Hit Points for yourself or an ally

repair_armor.name: Repair Armor
repair_armor.effect: Clear 1d4+Tier Armor Slots from your or an ally's armor

prepare.name: Prepare
prepare.effect: Describe how you prepare yourself for the path ahead, then gain a Hope. If you choose to Prepare with one or more members of your party, you each gain 2 Hope.

tend_all_wounds.name: Tend to All Wounds
tend_all_wounds.effect: Clear all Hit Points for yourself or an ally

repair_all_armor.name: Repair All Armor
repair_all_armor.effect: Clear all Armor Slots from your or an ally's armor

work_on_project.name: Work on a Project
work_on_project.effect: With GM approval, make progress on a long-term project or craft. Each time a PC makes the Work on a Project move, they either advance their project's countdown automatically or make an action roll to advance it (GM's choice).

tithe_to_patron.name: Tithe to Your Patron
tithe_to_patron.effect: Gain Favor equal to your Presence

domain_cards.title: Domain Card Management
domain_cards.description: During rest, you can move domain cards between your loadout and vault for free.
domain_cards.free_movement: Move domain cards between loadout and vault for free
domain_cards.no_stress_cost: Moving cards between loadout and vault costs no stress during rest

features.limited_uses_refresh: Features with limited uses per rest refresh
features.all_uses_refresh: All features with limited uses per rest or per long rest refresh

info.title: Downtime Moves
info.content: Choose exactly 2 downtime moves to perform during your rest. Some moves can target other characters.
info.content_three: Choose exactly 3 downtime moves to perform during your rest. Some moves can target other characters.

target_selection.title: Target Selection
target_selection.other_note: No effect will be applied to your character when targeting others.

prepare_mode.title: Choose Preparation Method
prepare_mode.description: Describe how you prepare yourself for the path ahead. Preparing with others gives more Hope but requires party coordination.

info.title: Domain Card Management
info.content: Reorganize your domain cards between your active loadout and vault. All card movements are free during rest.

info.title: Ready to Rest
info.content: Review your rest selections and add any external healing received from other players.

info.title: Healing from Others
info.content: If other players used healing or repair actions on you, enter the amounts here.

domain_cards.title: Domain Cards
domain_cards.no_cards_available: No domain cards available for this filter
domain_cards.info_content: Click cards to select or deselect. You can only exchange cards of the same level. Maximum cards equals your current total.
domain_cards.select_source_first: Select a card to replace first

empty_state.title: No Domain Cards
empty_state.description: You haven't acquired any domain cards yet.

swap_modal.title: Swap Domain Card
swap_modal.description: Your loadout is full (5/5 cards). Choose a card from your loadout to replace with
swap_modal.instruction: Click on a card below to swap it out.

header.title: Edit Character
header.description: Edit your character's information and details

attributes.title: Edit Attributes
attributes.instructions: Assign the following modifiers to your six attributes in any order you wish: +2, +1, +1, +0, +0, -1

info.title: Attribute Editing
info.content: You can reassign your attribute modifiers at any time during editing. This allows you to adjust your character's strengths and weaknesses.

confirm.title: Confirm Subclass Change
confirm.warning: This will replace your subclass features. Are you sure you want to continue?

domains.title: Edit Domains
domains.warning_content: Warning: Custom domains do not follow standard game settings. Domain cards from removed domains will be automatically deleted.
domains.cards_to_remove_description: {count} domain card(s) will be removed from domains that are no longer available.

info.title: Heritage Editing
info.content: You can change your character's ancestry and community. This will update your heritage information.

scars.title: Edit Scars
scars.warning_content: Scars permanently reduce your maximum Hope. Each scar crosses out one Hope slot that cannot be used.

info.title: Stats Editing
info.content: Edit your character's base stats (HP, Stress, Evasion). Advancement bonuses from HP slots, stress slots, and evasion increases are automatically applied on top of these base values.

origin.label: Where did your character come from?
origin.placeholder: Describe your character's homeland, community, or place of origin. What was their early life like?

motivation.label: What drives your character?
motivation.placeholder: What are their goals, dreams, or motivations? What brought them to this adventure?

relationships.label: Who are the important people in your character's life?
relationships.placeholder: Family, friends, mentors, rivals, or enemies. How do these relationships shape your character?

secrets.label: What secrets or mysteries surround your character?
secrets.placeholder: Hidden past, family secrets, unfinished business, or personal struggles.

traits.label: How does your character act and speak?
traits.placeholder: Personality traits, mannerisms, speech patterns, or quirks that make them unique.

beliefs.label: What does your character believe in?
beliefs.placeholder: Values, ideals, religious beliefs, or personal philosophies that guide their actions.

story.label: Tell your character's story
story.placeholder: Weave together the answers above into a cohesive background story. This can be as detailed or as ambiguous as you prefer - you can always discover more through play.

name.label: Experience Name
name.placeholder: e.g., Trained as a blacksmith, Noble court etiquette

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: Describe how this experience shaped your character...

connections.title: Character Connections
connections.description: Add your connections to other player characters and important NPCs. Work with your group to establish these relationships collaboratively.

description.label: Connection Description
description.placeholder: Describe your connection to this character...

custom_counters.title: Custom Counters
custom_counters.description: Create custom counters to track resources like Inspiration, Rage Points, Ki Points, or any other resource your character needs to track.
custom_counters.empty_state: No custom counters yet. Click the button below to add one.

attributes.title: Character Attributes
attributes.description: Edit your character's attribute modifiers. All six attributes must be assigned the standard distribution: +2, +1, +1, +0, +0, -1.
attributes.no_attributes: No attributes available. Please ensure your character has attributes assigned.

info.title: Attribute Editing
info.content: You can reassign your attribute modifiers at any time during editing. This allows you to adjust your character's strengths and weaknesses.

warning.title: Important
warning.content: Changing your subclass will replace your current subclass features with the new subclass features. Your class features will remain unchanged.

domains.title: Domains
domains.description: Override your character's domains. This is an advanced option that doesn't follow standard game settings.
domains.custom_warning: Custom domains are active (not using class defaults)

heritage.title: Heritage
heritage.description: Edit your character's ancestry and community.

info.title: Heritage Editing
info.content: You can change your character's ancestry and community. This will update your heritage information.

scars.title: Scars
scars.description: Scars are permanent marks from failed death saves that reduce your maximum Hope.

currency.title: Currency Settings
currency.description: Configure how your character tracks gold and currency.
currency.use_coins_description: Add coins as the smallest currency unit (10 coins = 1 handful)

massive_damage.title: Massive Damage (Optional Rule)
massive_damage.description: Enable the optional Massive Damage rule for this character.
massive_damage.enable_description: If a character takes damage equal to twice their Major threshold, they mark 4 HP instead of 3.
massive_damage.rule_explanation: When enabled, a fourth damage threshold button will appear. Damage equal to twice the Major threshold marks 4 HP.

cross_domain.title: Cross-Domain Card Advancement
cross_domain.description: Enable the optional Cross-Domain Card advancement for this character.
cross_domain.enable_description: Allow taking one domain card from any domain outside your class domains during level-up. The card's level cannot exceed half your character level (rounded up).

stats.title: Character Stats
stats.description: Edit your character's base stats (HP, Stress, Evasion). Advancement bonuses are applied automatically on top of these base values.

core.info_content: Each section in the Character Core tab saves immediately when you click Edit and confirm your changes.

errors.relic_already_exists_description: You can only carry one relic at a time. Remove your current relic before adding a new one.

companion.title: Companion
companion.name: Name
companion.experienceNote: Note: Companion experiences provide special abilities and bonuses.

noCompanion.title: No Companion
noCompanion.description: Your character doesn't have a companion yet. Create one to begin your adventures together.

notAvailable.title: Companion Not Available
notAvailable.description: Only characters with the Companion feature can have companions.

create.title: Create Companion
create.step1Description: Give your companion a name and describe their appearance and personality.
create.step2Description: Add up to 2 experiences that your companion has gained through their adventures with you.
create.experienceLimit: You can add up to 2 experiences for your new companion.

edit.title: Edit Companion
edit.experienceDescription: Edit your companion's experiences. You can have up to 2 experiences.

deleteModal.title: Delete Companion
deleteModal.message: Are you sure you want to delete this companion? This action cannot be undone.

advancement.title: Companion Training
advancement.description: Your companion can gain new abilities through training. Select one advancement that reflects how your companion has grown during your adventures.

experienceModal.title: Choose Companion Experience to Increase
experienceModal.experienceSelectedReady: Experience selected and ready to advance.
experienceModal.advancementDescription: Choose one of your companion's existing experiences to gain a permanent +1 bonus. This represents your companion's continued growth and training.
experienceModal.noExperiencesDescription: Your companion needs to have existing experiences to use this advancement.

intelligent.name: Intelligent
intelligent.description: Your companion gains a permanent +1 bonus to a Companion Experience of your choice.
intelligent.summary: Will enhance companion's chosen experience by +1

vicious.name: Vicious
vicious.description: Your companion becomes more effective in combat. Choose to improve either their damage die or attack range.

lightInTheDark.name: Light in the Dark
lightInTheDark.description: Your companion's presence grants you an additional Hope slot.

install.title: Install App
install.description: Install this app on your device for quick access and offline use.

offline.offline_with_pending: You're offline - {count} changes waiting to sync
offline.offline_no_pending: You're offline - Changes will sync when connection is restored

copyright.title: Copyright & Attribution
copyright.srd_content: This site uses only official Public Game Content from the Darrington Press System Reference Document (SRD), shared under the Community Gaming License. The descriptive text comes straight from the SRD, but all the images here are original creations inspired by those descriptions.
copyright.trademarks: We don't use any copyrighted art, logos, or story content from Critical Role or its related companies. All trademarks and rights belong to Critical Role, LLC and its partners. Just so you know, this project isn't officially connected to or endorsed by Critical Role or Darrington Press.
copyright.feedback: If you have any suggestions or feedback, please let us know by email at:

attribution.title: Daggerheart System Reference
attribution.license: This product includes materials from the Daggerheart System Reference Document 1.0, © Critical Role, LLC. under the terms of the Darrington Press Community Gaming (DPCGL) License.
attribution.more_info: More information can be found at
attribution.modifications: There are no previous modifications by others.

dice.critical_hit_explanation: Both dice show the same number - always counts as Hope!

standard.drop_lowest_tooltip: Roll an extra die and drop the lowest result (like Brutal/Massive)

drawer.title: Daggerheart Dice
drawer.subtitle: Roll your Hope and Fear dice

modal.title: Death Move
modal.description: Your character has marked their last Hit Point. You must choose one of the following death moves:
modal.ephemeral_notice: Your Ephemeral transformation requires you to choose Blaze of Glory.

blaze_of_glory.title: Blaze of Glory
blaze_of_glory.description: Your character embraces death and goes out in a blaze of glory. Take one final action. It automatically critically succeeds (with GM approval), and then you cross through the veil of death.
blaze_of_glory.final_action_placeholder: Describe how your character goes out in a blaze of glory...

avoid_death.title: Avoid Death
avoid_death.description: Your character avoids death and faces the consequences. They temporarily drop unconscious, and then you work with the GM to describe how the situation worsens. While unconscious, your character can't move or act, and they can't be targeted by an attack. They return to consciousness when an ally clears 1 or more of their marked Hit Points or when the party finishes a long rest.
avoid_death.scar_warning: After falling unconscious: Roll your Hope Die. If its value is equal to or less than your character's level ({level}), they gain a scar: permanently cross out a Hope slot.
avoid_death.roll_button: Roll Hope Die for Scar Check
avoid_death.scar_explanation: Hope Die ({roll}) ≤ Character Level ({level}) - Your character gains a scar.
avoid_death.no_scar_explanation: Hope Die ({roll}) > Character Level ({level}) - Your character avoids gaining a scar.

risk_it_all.title: Risk It All

rules.hope_higher: If the Hope Die is higher: stay on your feet and clear HP/Stress equal to the Hope Die value
rules.fear_higher: If the Fear Die is higher: cross through the veil of death
rules.dice_match: If the dice match: stay up and clear all Hit Points and Stress

risk_it_all.allocation_prompt: Allocate {points} points between Hit Points and Stress:

results.matching_dice: MATCHING DICE! Stay up and clear all Hit Points and Stress!
results.hope_wins: Hope Die wins! Stay on your feet!
results.fear_wins: Fear Die wins... Cross through the veil of death.

modal.title: Manage Inventory

empty_state.title: No Items Available
empty_state.description: There are no items available to add to your inventory.

modal.no_results: No items found matching your criteria

errors.create_failed: Failed to create custom item. Please try again.

weapons.no_weapons_description: Add weapons to store them when not equipped

armor.no_armor_description: Add armor to store it when not equipped

items.no_items_description: This character's backpack is empty. Items can be added during character creation or acquired during gameplay.
items.attach_to_weapon_description: Select a weapon to attach {itemName} to.
items.no_weapons_available: No weapons available to attach this item to.

use_modal.title: Use {itemName}
use_modal.last_use_warning: This is the last use of this item

effects.heal_choice: Heal {amount} Hit Points OR clear {amount} Stress (your choice)
effects.weapon_damage: Adds {amount} to your next weapon damage roll

advancement_selection.title: Advancements
advancement_selection.experience_advancement_warning: Experience advancement can only be taken once per tier. You have selected it {count} times, but only one will be applied.
advancement_selection.subclass_advancement_warning: Subclass feature advancement can only be taken once per tier. You have selected it {count} times, but only one will be applied.
advancement_selection.multiclass_advancement_warning: Multiclass advancement can only be taken once per character. You have selected it {count} times, but only one will be applied.
advancement_selection.not_enough_experiences: Not enough experiences found for this character. Your character needs at least two existing experiences to use this advancement.

damage_thresholds.title: Damage Thresholds
damage_thresholds.automatic_increase: All damage thresholds automatically increase by 1 when you level up.
damage_thresholds.resilience_description: Your character becomes more resilient as they level up. All damage thresholds increase by 1.
damage_thresholds.threshold_update_description: Your damage thresholds have been automatically increased. Your character can now withstand more damage before suffering consequences.

tier_achievements.title: Tier Achievements
tier_achievements.description: As you advance in level, you automatically gain tier achievements. These are not optional - you receive all applicable benefits for your new level.
tier_achievements.clear_traits_description: Clear any marked traits on your character
tier_achievements.experience_guidelines_description: Experiences represent significant moments, training, or knowledge your character has gained. They should be specific and meaningful to your character's story.
tier_achievements.experience_description_placeholder: Describe what happened and how it shaped your character...
tier_achievements.experience_description_help: Optional: Provide more details about this experience
tier_achievements.no_tier_achievement_description: Level advancement from {current} to {next} does not include a tier achievement. You will still gain other benefits in the following steps.
tier_achievements.experience_required_description: You must create a new experience to continue with this tier achievement.
tier_achievements.ready_to_continue_description: Your tier achievement benefits will be applied when you complete the level up process.

domain_cards.loadout_full_description: Your loadout is full. New cards will be added to your vault. You can reorganize your cards after leveling up.
domain_cards.no_available_cards_description: You have acquired all available domain cards for your class domains ({domains}) at level {level} or lower. Focus on the optional card exchange below.
domain_cards.school_of_knowledge_bonus: 📚 School of Knowledge: Your Accomplished or Brilliant feature grants an extra domain card!

multiclass_setup.title: Multiclass Setup
multiclass_setup.subtitle: Choose your second class and specialization
multiclass_setup.requirements_description: You are now learning from a second class! This process involves:
requirements_list: Selecting one domain from your new class
Choosing a subclass specialization from your new class
Gaining all foundation features from your selected subclass
Gaining all class features from your new class
multiclass_setup.choose_second_class_description: Select the class you want to learn from. This must be different from your primary class ({primaryClass}).
multiclass_setup.choose_domain_description: Choose one domain from {className}. You'll gain access to domain cards from this domain only.
multiclass_setup.choose_subclass_description: Select a subclass specialization from {className}. You'll gain a foundation card from this subclass.
multiclass_setup.gained_foundation_features_description: You automatically gain all foundation features from {subclass}.
multiclass_setup.gained_class_features_description: You automatically gain all class features from {className}.
multiclass_setup.class_features_placeholder: Class feature information will be displayed once a class is selected.
multiclass_setup.spellcast_trait_description: Both {primaryClass} and {secondaryClass} have different Spellcast traits. Choose which one to use.
multiclass_setup.setup_incomplete_description: Please complete the following to continue:
multiclass_setup.setup_complete_description: All multiclass selections have been made. You can now continue to the next step.

share.title: Share Character
share.private_description: Private shares can only be accessed with the direct link.
share.public_description: Public shares can be discovered by anyone.

permissions.title: Share Permissions
permissions.view_info: Recipients can view all character information
permissions.cannot_edit: Recipients cannot edit or modify the character
permissions.can_export: Recipients can export character data for reference
permissions.can_revoke: You can revoke access at any time

share.public_link_description: This is a public share link.
share.private_link_description: This is a private share link.
share.anyone_can_view: Anyone with this link can view your character sheet.

shares_page.title: Character Shares
shares_page.subtitle: Manage your shared characters and view characters shared with you.

empty.my_shares_description: You haven't shared any characters yet. Share a character from its page to get started.
empty.saved_shares_description: You haven't saved any shared characters yet. When someone shares a character with you, you can save it here for easy access.

modals.delete_message: Are you sure you want to delete this share for {name}? This action cannot be undone and the share link will no longer work.
modals.remove_message: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from your saved shares? This will not delete the original share.

account.title: Account Settings
account.subtitle: Manage your account information and preferences

preferences.subtitle: Customize your app experience
preferences.homebrew_content_description: When enabled, community-created content from the Workshop will be included in character creation and equipment selection.
preferences.cross_domain_cards_description: Allow taking a domain card from another domain during level-up (similar to Demiplane). Requires explicit opt-in per character or account.

membership.limit_reached: You've reached your limit. Upgrade your membership to create more!
membership.upgrade_description: Support Duality Codex and unlock more characters and campaigns! Supporter members can create up to 25 characters and campaigns combined.
membership.email_notice: Important: Use the same email ({email}) when subscribing on Ko-fi to automatically link your membership to this account.
membership.thank_you: Thank you for supporting Duality Codex! Your membership helps keep the project running.

theme.title: Theme
theme.subtitle: Choose a color theme for the application

delete_account.title: Delete Account
delete_account.warning_message: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and all your character data.
delete_account.description: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. This will permanently delete your account and all associated data.

deleted_items.characters: All your characters and their data

errors.password_min_length: Password must be at least 6 characters

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect your characters with third-party applications
integrations.description: Create API keys to allow external applications to access your character data securely.

api_keys.title: API Keys
api_keys.description: API keys allow external applications to access your character data. Each key can be used by one application.
api_keys.name: Key Name
api_keys.no_keys_description: You haven't created any API keys yet. Create one to get started with integrations.
api_keys.key_created_message: Your API key has been created. Make sure to copy it now - you won't be able to see it again!
api_keys.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this API key? This action cannot be undone and any applications using it will stop working.

owlbear_rodeo.title: Owlbear Rodeo
owlbear_rodeo.description: Connect your Daggerheart characters to Owlbear Rodeo for seamless character management during your games.

armor.major_threshold_note: Damage required to mark armor as broken

armor.major_threshold_invalid: Major threshold must be at least 1

items.no_effects: No effects added yet. Click 'Add Effect' to create one.

classes.manage_description: Create and manage custom classes for your games
classes.description_placeholder: Describe the class's role, abilities, and playstyle...

classes.suggested_weapons_hint: Select up to 2 starting weapons for this class.
classes.suggested_armor_hint: Select starting armor for this class.
classes.starting_items_hint: Select starting items that characters of this class receive during character creation.
classes.equipment_filter_hint: Filter equipment options for starting weapons, armor, and items
classes.hope_feature_hint: Every class has a unique Hope Feature that costs 3 Hope to use.
classes.no_features_hint: No features added yet. Class features are optional.
